basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree in Basic Science, Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course with NET/GATE, Biomedical Engineering/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences and Bioengineering/ Materials Science/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): PG Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET or GATE or National level examinations by Central Government Departments. Streams: Biomedical Engineering/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences and Bioengineering/ Materials Science and Materials Engineering/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering with first division. Valid GATE scorecard required unless CSIR-UGC NET qualified. Minimum 60% from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a PG Degree in Basic Science or a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course with NET/GATE qualification in relevant engineering or science streams.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000 plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official IIT Indore website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which streams are eligible for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Eligible streams include Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Biosciences and Bioengineering, Materials Science and Materials Engineering, Mechanical, and Electrical Engineering.

faq.question: Q10. Does the candidate need a GATE scorecard?
faq.answer: A valid GATE scorecard is required unless the candidate is qualified through CSIR-UGC NET.
